hero.title: Movie Promotion & Celebrity Management
hero.description:
At Film Industry MP, we operate as a network-driven facilitation platform, connecting filmmakers and brands with trusted local coordinators, production teams, and promotion partners across Madhya Pradesh.

Our approach ensures efficient execution, local expertise, and scalable support across multiple cities and districts.

whyPromote: Large Tier-2 & Tier-3 audience base across multiple districts
High youth engagement through colleges & public events
Cost-effective promotion execution through local networks

services.title: Press Conferences & Media Management
items: Regional TV & print media coordination via city networks
Press kit facilitation through local teams
Structured media interaction planning with on-ground coordinators

services.title: Mall & Public Event Promotions
items: Stage & branding setup via local execution teams
Public meet & greet managed by city representatives
Sound, lighting & technical setup via verified vendors

services.title: College & Youth Promotions
items: Celebrity interaction planning with regional support
Social media amplification through local networks

services.title: Premiere & Special Screening
items: Red carpet event coordination via city teams
Security & protocol handled by local partners
Media coverage planning with regional media

celebrityManagement.description: Whether for film promotions, brand launches, corporate events, or public programs — we provide celebrities according to your event type and budget.

strategicBenefits: Increased box office traction in MP
